allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-Command', 'netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Vite Dev Server" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=5173' -Wait)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = { $true }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-22" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Notes count:"; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host $json.notes.Count; Write-Host "Summary \(first 50 chars\): $\($json.summary.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $json.summary.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{text = "今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{text = "今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $responseBytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $responseStr = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($responseBytes\); Write-Host "Response: $responseStr" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{text = "今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Length: $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\)"; Write-Host "Input length: $\('今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭'.Length\)"; $responseBytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); Write-Host "Response bytes length: $\($responseBytes.Length\)"; $jsonStr = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($responseBytes\); Write-Host "JSON: $jsonStr"; $obj = $jsonStr | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Text length: $\($obj.text.Length\)"; Write-Host "Text bytes: $\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($obj.text\).Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{text = "今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $responseBytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $obj = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($responseBytes\) | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Input: $\($body.Length\) chars"; Write-Host "Output: $\($obj.text.Length\) chars"; Write-Host "Added punctuation: $\($obj.text.Length - '今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭'.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Health: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend not running: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{text = "今天天气很好"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { $response = $_.Exception.Response; if \($response\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "Error body: $body" } else { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body '{"text":"今天天气很好"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.GetType\(\).Name })

PowerShell($body = '{"text":"今天天气很好我去公园散步然后回家做饭"}'; $bodyBytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice/punctuate" -Method POST -Body $bodyBytes -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $raw = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($raw\); Write-Host "Raw response: $text"; Write-Host "Input len: 17 chars"; Write-Host "Output json len: $\($text.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(cd "D:\\claude vibe coding project\\daily-reflect\\server"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "powershell" -ArgumentList '-Command', 'uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 2>&1' -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "Backend starting...")
PowerShell(try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-23" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $res.Content } catch { Write-Output "Backend not responding: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-23/keywords" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $res.Content } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"message": "你好，回响"}' ; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-26/discuss" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing 2>&1; \($response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).discussion | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)

PowerShell($reopenBody = '{}'; $reopenResult = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-26/reopen" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $reopenBody; Write-Output "=== After reopen, discussion count: $\($reopenResult.discussion.Count\) ==="; $reopenResult.discussion | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.role\): $\($_.content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $_.content.Length\)\)\)..." }; $discussBody = '{"message": "测试消息123"}'; $discussResult = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries/2026-05-26/discuss" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $discussBody; Write-Output "=== After discuss, discussion count: $\($discussResult.discussion.Count\) ==="; $discussResult.discussion | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.role\): $\($_.content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $_.content.Length\)\)\)..." })

PowerShell($frontend = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -SkipCertificateCheck -TimeoutSec 5; "OK" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; $backend = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Host "Frontend: $frontend"; Write-Host "Backend: $backend")

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -match "192.168|198.18" } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias; Write-Host "=== Can phone reach us? ==="; arp -a | Select-String "192.168.0")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Output "Backend:"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/entries" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "Frontend:"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
